betBackCandidates.note: Betcha bet-back candidates scan current races on the configured NZ and Tier 1 Australian pilot tracks. Ranking is grouped by discipline and keeps up to five candidates per discipline. Scores blend historical cash-plus-bonus averages for matching favourite price and starter-count buckets; this is not stake sizing or automated wagering advice.

note: Public racing promotions are matched to current race cards where a race-card URL is available. Signals are statistical comparisons only, not staking advice or automated wagering instructions.

allPromotions.description: Bet $10+ on the All Whites to progress past the group stage and get $10 Bonus Cash for every goal they score. Bonus Cash paid after All Whites match. Max Bonus $10 per goal. One entry per person. Available markets to bet on: 'NZ to Qualify from group G' and 'To Qualify from Group G - NZ'
Join Betcha and get up to $100 in Bonus Cash when you sign up and deposit $50!
Super boosted odds for Cam Roigard to Score a Try in the Hurricanes v Chiefs game. Was $2.30 Now $3.00. Max Bet $20, one per person.

Place a Head to Head bet on any UFC Fight Night: Kape vs Horiguchi main card fight and if your fighter loses by KO/TKO/SUB in the final round, you’ll get paid out as a winner. Applies to the first $250 staked.

allPromotions.description: Place a $10+ bet on any World Cup Group Stage match to earn entries into regular prize draws, including a chance to win 1 of 10 $5,000 Bonus Cash prizes. Min odds $1.20. T&Cs apply.
Place a First Goal Scorer bet on selected World Cup matches, and if your player doesn't score first but scores any other time, get up to $25 back as Bonus Cash. One per selected match. T&Cs apply.

Place a Fixed Odds Win bet on selected Bonus Back races at Ellerslie & Ipswich and if your runner finishes 2nd or 3rd, get your stake back in Bonus Cash. Max Bonus Varies. T&Cs apply.
Place a 3+ leg Same Game Multi on the Hurricanes v Chiefs Super Rugby Pacific Final and if 1 leg fails get your stake back in Bonus Cash. One refund per game. Max Bonus Varies.
